changes.value:
kanban-cli/src/cli_gen.rs, kanban-cli/src/main.rs

The cli_gen module has no tests — `build_commands_from_schema`, `extract_noun_verb_arguments`, and the arg extraction functions are all untested. The banner module has tests (good), but the core CLI generation and dispatch path has none.

Suggestion: Add tests for build_commands_from_schema (verify noun-verb structure) and extract_noun_verb_arguments (verify round-trip from schema to args to JSON)."
No unit tests for cli_gen or main dispatch logic
